description: Quantified data-bottleneck comparisons for Table 2. Point estimates are OOF folds 1-8 Average Precision; no fold10 contact; computed by reusing frozen OOF per-ECG scores and stored multiseed outputs. Paired bootstrap CIs are on the OOF AP difference AP(A)-AP(B).

paired_bootstrap_params.method: stratified: positives and negatives resampled with replacement separately
paired_bootstrap_params.ci_definition: 2.5th and 97.5th percentiles of AP(A)-AP(B) across resamples

seed_sd_scale_warning: Across-seed SD scale is NOT uniform: XGBoost models' frozen multiseed was computed on fold9 (13 WPW, noisy); M7's is OOF-scale (run9); the deterministic rank-vote ensemble has no training seed (SD 0). The paired bootstrap CI on the OOF difference is the reliable uncertainty for each comparison.

1_add_M5_to_committee.label: Adding M5 spatial to the M3+M4 committee

paired_bootstrap_ci95.method: stratified: positives and negatives resampled with replacement separately
paired_bootstrap_ci95.ci_definition: 2.5th and 97.5th percentiles of AP(A)-AP(B) across resamples

across_seed_sd.note: deterministic rank-vote, no training seed on either side

1_add_M5_to_committee.verdict: significantly worse: adding the weak M5 detector (standalone AP 0.429) hurts the committee (CI excludes 0)

2_feature_union_v1_vs_vote.label: Feature-union model (v1) vs the M3+M4 vote

side_A.name: best_model v1 (XGBoost on union of gate-passed M1-M5 features)

paired_bootstrap_ci95.method: stratified: positives and negatives resampled with replacement separately
paired_bootstrap_ci95.ci_definition: 2.5th and 97.5th percentiles of AP(A)-AP(B) across resamples

across_seed_sd.note: best_model multiseed SD is fold9-scale (13 WPW); the vote has no training seed

3_feature_union_clinical_v2_vs_vote.label: Feature-union + clinical model (v2) vs the M3+M4 vote

side_A.name: best_model v2 (v1 union plus 54 clinical-interval features)

paired_bootstrap_ci95.method: stratified: positives and negatives resampled with replacement separately
paired_bootstrap_ci95.ci_definition: 2.5th and 97.5th percentiles of AP(A)-AP(B) across resamples

across_seed_sd.note: best_model_v2 multiseed SD is fold9-scale; the vote has no training seed

3_feature_union_clinical_v2_vs_vote.verdict: not statistically separable: +0.023 (a trend), CI includes 0

4_cnn_vs_wavelet.label: CNN (M7) vs wavelet detector (M3)

paired_bootstrap_ci95.method: stratified: positives and negatives resampled with replacement separately
paired_bootstrap_ci95.ci_definition: 2.5th and 97.5th percentiles of AP(A)-AP(B) across resamples

across_seed_sd.fold: A=OOF (M7 run9 from-scratch seed SD); B=fold9 (M3 frozen multiseed)
across_seed_sd.note: scales differ: M7 seed SD is OOF-scale, M3 seed SD is fold9-scale

4_cnn_vs_wavelet.verdict: not statistically separable: +0.032, CI includes 0 (paired on the 53538 ECGs common to M3 and M7)

5_pretraining_vs_scratch.label: Self-supervised pretraining (finetune) vs from-scratch (M7)

side_A.name: M7 pretrained then finetuned (best pretrained mode)

5_pretraining_vs_scratch.paired_ci_note: NOT computable from frozen artifacts without retraining: m7_run9_transfer_ab.json stores only per-mode summary AP and seed statistics, not per-ECG OOF scores for the two modes. Reported instead: point APs, per-side CIs, seed means/SDs, and the stored delta at 1.04 sigma (pre-registered gate did not pass).

across_seed_sd.note: seed SDs from the run9 transfer A/B

5_pretraining_vs_scratch.verdict: no benefit: point APs tied (0.625 vs 0.628); seed-mean advantage +0.014 at 1.04 sigma; gate_pass = false
